title: agropyron × saxicola
intro: Agropyron × saxicola, also known as crested wheatgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Crested wheatgrass has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture form, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
